metric_value: >7,000 companies worldwide
notes: SAP dominated world market for corporate ERP by 1997

metric_value: >40% growth rate
notes: SAP at peak growth; market saturation risk emerging

metric_value: $2.4 billion (38% increase)
notes: Washington Technology Dec 1997 article confirms $2.4B worldwide sales

metric_value: SAP as coach throughout full R/3 lifecycle; coordinated network of products, processes, people
notes: SAP taking accountability role for implementation outcomes — major strategic shift

metric_value: AcceleratedSAP Partner; Powered By AcceleratedSAP (Global Logo); Certified Business Solutions (sub-$200M revenue)
notes: Three-tier certification model for implementation partners

metric_name: Customer demand #1: Business results over re-engineering
metric_value: Customers want rapid business results, not multi-year re-engineering — especially with Y2K and Euro urgency
notes: Aberdeen interviews with SAP customers and management

metric_name: Customer demand #2: SAP participation in procurement/deployment
metric_value: Greater SAP involvement in selection, procurement and full deployment scope
notes: 'SAP skin in the game' recurring theme in Aberdeen executive interviews

metric_value: Need for R/3 plus complementary products for supply chain and other requirements
notes: Growing SAP Business Framework ecosystem addressed this need

metric_name: Customer demand #4: Quality assurance for multi-component implementations
metric_value: Comprehensive QA for Business Framework with SAP + partner software components
notes: Partner integration complexity growing with R/3's expanding ecosystem

metric_name: Customer demand #5: Rapid operational improvement while re-engineering
metric_value: Ability to turn on a dime — simultaneously reengineer and gain rapid operational improvements
notes: Aberdeen identifies this as a key tension in 1997 R/3 implementations

metric_value: First branded implementation solutions directly supported by SAP; SAP-derived resource estimates; shared project strategies; standardized across geographies
notes: AcceleratedSAP Road Map provides guidance for full project lifecycle

metric_value: Largest SAP implementation partners; 300 Andersen technicians specialized in Siebel/SAP installation by 1997; take project lead
notes: Aberdeen identifies potential tension: SAP controls may challenge Global Logo business models

metric_name: TeamSAP challenge #1: SAP professional services role ambiguity
metric_value: Lack of clear formula for SAP involvement level beyond basic coaching; risk of duplicated efforts with partners
notes: Aberdeen's most specific critical observation of TeamSAP weaknesses

metric_name: TeamSAP challenge #2: Global Logo Partner resistance
metric_value: Global Logo Partners may view SAP standards/controls as challenge to their own successful business models
notes: Aberdeen acknowledges long-term interests likely aligned; short-term adoption risk

metric_value: TeamSAP will provide real benefit to customers seeking rapid and ongoing R/3 results
notes: Aberdeen conditional endorsement; not a blanket prediction of success

metric_value: Inert model of re-engineer-then-implement being replaced by smaller continuous technology-enabled changes
notes: Prescient observation — continuous deployment / agile ERP became dominant paradigm

metric_value: AcceleratedSAP evolved into SAP Activate methodology (2015); continues as standard SAP implementation framework for S/4HANA
notes: SAP Activate built on ASAP foundations; still the primary SAP implementation methodology

metric_value: SAP S/4HANA generally available 2015; built exclusively on HANA in-memory database; successor to R/3 and ECC
notes: SAP ECC mainstream maintenance ends 2027; S/4HANA is strategic future platform

metric_value: Andersen Consulting rebranded as Accenture in January 2001; remains world's largest management consulting firm
notes: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Accenture; largest SAP Global Logo Partner continues under new name

metric_value: Businesses with annual revenues under $200 million
notes: CBS program created a third tier below National Partners and Global Logo Partners

metric_value: Joint Development Partners (co-development with SAP); Certified Interface Partners (certified interoperability)
notes: SAP tripled resources for CSP certification in past year preceding white paper

metric_value: Online competency center for SAP, partner, and customer knowledge transfer
notes: Early enterprise knowledge management platform; precursor to SAP Community Network

metric_value: Proactive system diagnostics program recognizing and remedying potential problems early
notes: Still available in 2026 as SAP EarlyWatch Alert; one of SAP's most enduring service offerings
